test_cases.input_summary: Microplastics food chain explainer, 2 minutes, general audience, infographic style, follows interview transition
test_cases.notes: Strong two-column format. Visual cues specific enough for animation team. Word count matched duration target. Pauses built in at appropriate moments. Transition from interview handled cleanly.

test_cases.input_summary: Financial system explainer — how money laundering works in 90 seconds, investigative tone, specialist-adjacent audience
test_cases.notes: Complex subject broken down clearly. Three-stage process structure effective. Visual metaphors appropriate for investigative tone. One visual cue slightly vague — 'financial flow diagram' could be more specific.

test_cases.input_summary: Climate data visualisation, 3 minutes, educational tone, 3D style preference, standalone sequence not connected to interview
test_cases.notes: Handled longer duration well without padding. Data points clearly specified. 3D visual direction was competent but noted that a storyboard would be particularly important for 3D work. Standalone opening slightly less strong without interview context to anchor to.
